title: EventEnvelopeV1
description: Common envelope for every Redis Stream message per docs/conventions/events.md. Per-stream schemas $ref this and override `data`.

traceparent.description: W3C Trace Context traceparent header value, propagation vehicle per ADR 0015.

tracestate.description: Optional W3C tracestate value, present when the originating request had one.

trace_id.description: The 32-hex trace-id segment of `traceparent`. Log-only convenience per events.md:57-59; never used for propagation.

data.description: Per-stream payload. Stream schemas override with a concrete object shape.
